title: Technoblade Everyone
description: all players (steve, alex, efe and more) become Technoblade
body:
eng:
This resource pack replaces all minecraft characters(Sunny, Zuri, Makena, Steve, Alex, Kai, Efe, Ari and Noor) with Technoblade skins.
Technoblade never dies!!!
Rus:
Этот ресурспак заменяет всех персонажей Minecraft(Sunny, Zuri, Makena, Steve, Alex, Kai, Efe, Ari и Noor) на скины Техноблейда.
Техноблейд никогда не умрёт!!!
![techno](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f2314f82e22c9639dc340fc69c8c49dcddebb3e.png)
